title: Worked Example - Storing and Displaying Exam Score

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we will declare multiple variables of the same type in a **single statement**, assign values, and print them in Java. This approach makes the code more concise and improves readability.  

---

**When executed, the code will show:**  

```java
Math Score: 85
Science Score: 90
English Score: 78
```
